tracks.name: network
current_support: discovery and dependency graph for VPC, subnet, route table, security group
risk scan for public exposure and route topology
Lambda VPC config recreation when subnet/security group IDs already exist
tracks.recommended_method: Recreate network explicitly before application deploy; map or precreate VPC/subnet/security-group targets.
next_steps: Add target-side mapping for route tables and VPC IDs

tracks.name: api_gateway
current_support: API Gateway discovery is implemented
API creation is implemented in deploy flow
tracks.recommended_method: Use current deploy flow for simple REST APIs; keep stage/domain/integration review manual until expanded coverage lands.
next_steps: Add stage deployment, authorizers, domain mappings, and usage plans
Add validation of API integrations after deploy

tracks.name: rds_data_migration
current_support: RDS discovery and risk analysis are implemented
No live RDS migration executor is implemented yet
tracks.recommended_method: Use AWS DMS or snapshot/restore strategy depending on engine and downtime needs.
next_steps: Add DMS task generation or snapshot-based runbook export

tracks.name: s3_object_transfer
current_support: S3 bucket discovery and review flags are implemented
Object transfer is not automated yet
tracks.recommended_method: Use S3 sync/replication/DataSync-style transfer plan for bucket objects; keep object migration explicit.
next_steps: Add object copy/sync executor with dry-run and checksum reporting

tracks.name: full_ecs_service_migration
current_support: ECS clusters, task definitions, and services are present in deploy flow
ECS discovery includes tasks, schedules, metrics, and event history
tracks.recommended_method: Use current ECS deploy path for metadata recreation; add image, networking, and LB validation for production-grade migrations.
next_steps: Add ECR image strategy and ECS service validation checks

tracks.name: ec2_strategy
current_support: No direct EC2 migration executor is implemented
Infrastructure discovery can expose surrounding dependencies
tracks.recommended_method: Use AMI copy/share for image-based moves or AWS MGN for continuous server replication.
next_steps: Add EC2/AMI discovery and recommendation engine
Generate AMI/MGN runbooks from snapshot data

tracks.name: iam_kms_deeper_handling
current_support: IAM role cloning is implemented
Secrets and queues preserve KMS references when present
Risk scan catches overly broad IAM patterns
tracks.recommended_method: Use current IAM clone flow for roles; add customer-managed KMS key mapping and policy narrowing before production rollout.
next_steps: Add KMS key discovery and remapping

tracks.name: iac_export
current_support: CloudFormation discovery and review flags are implemented
AWS-to-Git export of discovered artifacts is implemented
tracks.recommended_method: Use snapshot export as the current audit artifact; add Terraform/CloudFormation generation as a dedicated export layer.
next_steps: Generate Terraform/CloudFormation templates from sanitized snapshot
Annotate unsupported resources in export report

tracks.name: zero_downtime_orchestration
current_support: Validation and redeploy flows exist
No full change-plan / cutover orchestrator is implemented yet
tracks.recommended_method: Use staged deploy plus validate for now; add cutover plans per service type before advertising zero-downtime migrations.
next_steps: Introduce dry-run change plan and cutover ordering
Add rollback hints and per-service downtime classification
